/usr/bin/c++   -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/fcw_system.dir/src/main.cpp.o  -o fcw_system -Wl,-rpath,"/media/duong/WD 500GB ELEMENTS/KLTN/onnxruntime-linux-aarch64-1.13.1/lib:" -lstdc++fs libfcw_lib.a -lstdc++fs /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_dnn.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_video.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_features2d.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_flann.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.1.1 -lpthread "/media/duong/WD 500GB ELEMENTS/KLTN/onnxruntime-linux-aarch64-1.13.1/lib/libonnxruntime.so" /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.5.2
